textByHashes.9b6f48c82fa631b198aa9f4445a7aac29c566714: You're not wrong about that. It's my travelling companion, Hanchen. They say he's the latest victim of the Sleeper Plague.
textByHashes.e5c0b60de864d373c5a2942321f1a5001a81f85e: I've no idea. We'd just been to the pub for a quick drink. On our way back, he started to act all odd, then he just collapsed.
textByHashes.4f959cfda806bbfdb8e2b34c04a861defd7a0f28: Yes. The Rat & Bat just south east of here. I'm not a drinker myself but Hanchen's always loved a good tipple.
textByHashes.743d818cf1765c4be1a33f824333942c885be021: No, I never drink. Hanchen on the other hand was loving those Bloody Bracers.
textByHashes.06f6cd19ffab2e401771369eda2a661ec87d00fe: Like I said, I've no idea. We'd just been to the pub when it happened. Hanchen's always loved a good drink.
textByHashes.206fdde5ca96da39c8c1402c0041b13a6951dea2: Some mysterious illness. You'll have to ask the sisters if you want to know more.
textByHashes.84bacd729f0a67d757137b5b73afbdd1a5268fbd: No, not at all. We came here from afar with the tattooed guy outside.
textByHashes.2f714b30d4460df5efc096d2f2c3c1f9e8bccafa: We travelled eastwards over many oceans.
textByHashes.7d661a37e6984add9188878fa6183f8e4d85b030: I ask myself the same question. We came here on a quest. You see, I found a poem in the College of Bards that told of the sanctuary below. It seemed worthy of exploration.
textByHashes.23be109bf5f7ce6fc65511ef9696110b3a11d52d: No? Have you not visited the grand Kingdom of Varlamore? The college is but one of many attractions.
textByHashes.c31567b5f215c62a67a55e58ac4399ec7ea2408f: You won't regret it! With all that's happened, I'd much rather be back there.
textByHashes.79c39b72be41229c0f15cee00cf0dbd7bdb85814: To be honest, the poem didn't say much. Although I found this while searching this church.
textByHashes.d26baba1c15f0f4408550975a28f8c9aaff53ac1: Well it's not like I have much to be happy about. First one of my travelling companions catches the Sleeper Plague, then the other goes and gets executed. We should never have come here.
textByHashes.ab988e0242685c5e0bf8233b2d4dcd60e17873bd: No, not at all. We came here from afar.
textByHashes.5b1f2d1e61991bba23661c24ad945ff132f330e8: I ask myself the same question. We came here on a quest. You see, I found a poem in the College of Bards that told of the sanctuary below.
textByHashes.aeaf9cb28bce1af6f120c037f664af9aa2851fc3: Everything I know is in that parchment I gave you earlier. You should give it a read.
